## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Rule / variation
- [ ] UX / polish
- [ ] Bot behavior
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (engine + UI smoke).
- [ ] Ran `npm run build:html`; `assets/app.html` is committed and current.
- [ ] If rules changed: added/updated targeted assertions in `tests/engine.test.js`.
- [ ] If UI flow changed: the headless smoke test still drives it.
- [ ] No hidden information is revealed on shared screens.
- [ ] No commercial elements (ads, paywalls, telemetry) and no official Secret
      Hitler artwork added (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, NonCommercial).
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.
